goals.title: Improve the Self-Improvement Pipeline
goals.description: Make the self-improvement system faster, safer, and more autonomous
goals.rationale: The self-improvement pipeline is the foundation of autonomy. Improving it has compounding returns.

goals.title: Reduce Response Latency
goals.description: Optimize LLM calls, caching, and processing to reduce end-to-end response time
goals.rationale: Faster responses improve user experience and enable more iterations per session

subGoals.title: Analyze ai.ts for performance improvements
subGoals.description: Optimize LLM calls, caching, and processing to reduce end-to-end response time — focus on ai.ts

goals.title: Achieve Zero-Downtime Self-Modification
goals.description: Ensure self-improvements can be applied without service interruption
goals.rationale: Downtime during self-improvement breaks the autonomous loop

goals.title: Expand Tool Coverage
goals.description: Add new tools and capabilities based on usage patterns and user needs
goals.rationale: More tools = more problems solvable = higher utility

subGoals.title: Analyze reactEngine.ts for capability improvements
subGoals.description: Add new tools and capabilities based on usage patterns and user needs — focus on reactEngine.ts

subGoals.title: Analyze multiAgent.ts for capability improvements
subGoals.description: Add new tools and capabilities based on usage patterns and user needs — focus on multiAgent.ts

goals.title: Reduce TypeScript Errors After Self-Modification
goals.description: Improve the proposal generation to produce changes that pass type checking on first attempt
goals.rationale: Type errors after self-modification waste cycles and reduce confidence in auto-apply

subGoals.title: Analyze selfImprove.ts for self_improvement improvements
subGoals.description: Improve the proposal generation to produce changes that pass type checking on first attempt — focus on selfImprove.ts

goals.title: Improve Test Coverage for Critical Paths
goals.description: Generate and maintain tests for all critical system paths
goals.rationale: Higher test coverage enables more confident auto-application of changes

goals.description: Ensure maximum useful information per token in LLM context
goals.rationale: Better context utilization = better responses with same cost

goals.title: Improve Goal Decomposition Quality
goals.description: Make the goal decomposition system produce more actionable, well-scoped sub-goals
goals.rationale: Better decomposition leads to better execution of all other goals
